modelDesc: A sender emits heartbeat periodically every 2 time units. A monitor raises alarm if no heartbeat is received within 5 time units.

timeConstraints.description: heartbeat interval is 2 time units
alarm triggers if heartbeat absent for 5 time units

subsystems.name: Sender
subsystems.description: Sends heartbeat signal every 2 time units.

subsystems.name: Monitor
subsystems.description: Waits for heartbeat and triggers alarm on timeout.

assertions.customDescription: alarm state is reachable when no heartbeat for 5 time units

modelDesc: A light blinks on and off. It stays on for 3 time units, then turns off for 3 time units, cycling continuously.

timeConstraints.description: each on/off phase lasts 3 time units

subsystems.name: Light
subsystems.description: A light that toggles between on and off every 3 time units.

modelDesc: A coffee machine takes 4 time units to brew coffee. If brewing takes longer than 6 time units, a cleanup cycle is triggered.

timeConstraints.description: normal brewing duration is 4 time units
cleanup triggers if brewing exceeds 6 time units

subsystems.name: CoffeeMaker
subsystems.description: Brews coffee. If done within time, dispenses coffee. Otherwise triggers cleanup.

subsystems.name: Timer
subsystems.description: Monitors brewing duration and signals timeout at 6 time units.

assertions.customDescription: cleanup state is reachable after timeout

modelDesc: A pedestrian walk signal shows WALK for 4 time units then changes to DONT_WALK for 8 time units, cycling continuously.

timeConstraints.description: walk signal duration is 4 time units
dont_walk signal duration is 8 time units

subsystems.name: Crosswalk
subsystems.description: Cycles between WALK and DONT_WALK states with timed intervals.

assertions.customDescription: Define state walk_on to represent the WALK signal is active. Assert it is always the case that eventually walk_on.

modelDesc: A three-phase traffic light: GREEN for 10 time units, YELLOW for 3 time units, RED for 10 time units, then back to GREEN.

timeConstraints.description: green phase lasts 10 time units
yellow phase lasts 3 time units
red phase lasts 10 time units

subsystems.name: Light
subsystems.description: Cycles through GREEN, YELLOW, RED phases with respective timed durations.

assertions.customDescription: Define state green_active to represent the GREEN signal is on. Assert it is always the case that eventually green_active.

modelDesc: A parking meter accepts payment for 5 time units of parking. After payment, the meter counts down and expires, at which point a violation timer starts with a 2 time unit grace period.

timeConstraints.description: paid parking duration is 5 time units
grace period after expiry is 2 time units

subsystems.name: Meter
subsystems.description: Accepts payment, counts down parking time, then expires.

subsystems.name: Enforcement
subsystems.description: Monitors meter status and issues violation after grace period.

assertions.customDescription: violation is issued after meter expires and grace period passes

modelDesc: An ATM session: after card insertion, the user must input PIN within 8 time units. If timeout occurs, the card is ejected and the session ends.

timeConstraints.description: PIN input must complete within 8 time units

subsystems.name: ATM
subsystems.description: Accepts card, waits for PIN, processes transaction or ejects card on timeout.

subsystems.name: User
subsystems.description: Inserts card and provides PIN (may delay beyond timeout).

assertions.customDescription: card is ejected on PIN timeout

modelDesc: An elevator door opens for 8 time units, then closes automatically. If someone presses the reopen button while closing, the door reopens.

timeConstraints.description: door stays open for 8 time units before closing

subsystems.name: Door
subsystems.description: Door opens, stays open for 8 time units, then closes.

subsystems.name: Button
subsystems.description: Reopen button press that interrupts the closing sequence.

modelDesc: A reactor temperature monitor: when temperature exceeds threshold, the cooling system must activate within 3 time units. If cooling fails, emergency shutdown occurs within 5 time units.

timeConstraints.description: cooling must activate within 3 time units of overheat
emergency shutdown within 5 time units if cooling fails

subsystems.name: Reactor
subsystems.description: Operates normally or overheats. Accepts cooling signal to return to normal.

subsystems.name: SafetyMonitor
subsystems.description: Detects overheat, attempts cooling, triggers emergency shutdown if cooling fails.

assertions.customDescription: emergency shutdown is reachable when cooling fails

modelDesc: An assembly workstation: a robot arm must complete its welding task within 10 time units. If the deadline is missed, an alert is raised and the arm resets.

timeConstraints.description: welding must complete within 10 time units

subsystems.name: RobotArm
subsystems.description: Starts welding, must finish within 10 time units or triggers timeout.

subsystems.name: Controller
subsystems.description: Monitors welding progress, raises alert on timeout, initiates reset.

assertions.customDescription: alert is reachable when welding times out

modelDesc: Fischer's mutual exclusion protocol: 4 processes compete for a shared resource. Each process sets a shared variable to its id, then waits Delta time units. If the variable still equals its id after the wait, it enters the critical section. Delta = 3, Epsilon = 5.

timeConstraints.description: Delta = 3 time units: max delay between write of id and read-back check
Epsilon = 5 time units: wait time before re-checking if variable changed

subsystems.name: Process0
subsystems.description: Process with id 0: sets shared var to 0, waits Delta, enters CS if var still 0.

subsystems.name: Process1
subsystems.description: Process with id 1: sets shared var to 1, waits Delta, enters CS if var still 1.

subsystems.name: Process2
subsystems.description: Process with id 2: sets shared var to 2, waits Delta, enters CS if var still 2.

subsystems.name: Process3
subsystems.description: Process with id 3: sets shared var to 3, waits Delta, enters CS if var still 3.

assertions.customDescription: Define state mutex where at most one process is in critical section (counter <= 1). Assert it is always the case that mutex holds.
Define state progress0 where eventually process 0 enters critical section. Assert it is always the case that eventually progress0.

modelDesc: CSMA/CD protocol: 2 nodes share a channel. Each node listens, if idle transmits 3 ticks, else backs off. Node0 backoff=2, Node1 backoff=4. Only one transmits at a time.

timeConstraints.description: transmission takes 3 time units
Node0 backoff is 2 ticks
Node1 backoff is 4 ticks

subsystems.name: Node0
subsystems.description: Node 0: listens, if idle transmits 3 ticks. If busy backs off 2 ticks.

subsystems.name: Node1
subsystems.description: Node 1: listens, if idle transmits 3 ticks. If busy backs off 4 ticks.

assertions.customDescription: Define state no_collision where at most one node holds the channel (medium == TX0 or medium == TX1). Assert it is always the case that no_collision holds.

modelDesc: Railway: train approaches bridge, controller lowers gate. Train must not cross while gate is up. Controller lowers gate within 2 ticks after approach.

timeConstraints.description: gate lowered within 2 ticks after approach

subsystems.name: Train
subsystems.description: Train approaches bridge, waits for gate, crosses, then leaves.

subsystems.name: Controller
subsystems.description: Detects approaching train, lowers gate for 2 ticks, then raises.

assertions.customDescription: Define state safe where train never crosses while gate is up. Assert safe always holds.

modelDesc: Pacemaker: heart beats every 5 ticks. If heart stops, pacemaker detects within 2 ticks and delivers pacing pulse.

timeConstraints.description: heart beats every 5 ticks
pacemaker responds within 2 ticks

subsystems.name: Heart
subsystems.description: Heart beats naturally every 5 time units.

subsystems.name: Pacemaker
subsystems.description: Monitors heartbeat. If heart stops, delivers pace within 2 ticks.

assertions.customDescription: Define pacing_ok where heart always eventually beats. Assert pacing_ok holds.

modelDesc: FDDI token ring: 2 stations, token passes between them. Sync messages take 2 ticks. Station A sends async when time permits.

timeConstraints.description: sync message takes 2 ticks
async message takes 1 tick

subsystems.name: Ring
subsystems.description: Passes token between Station A and Station B.

subsystems.name: StationA
subsystems.description: Sends sync (2 ticks) and async messages (1 tick).

subsystems.name: StationB
subsystems.description: Sends sync messages (2 ticks).

modelDesc: Lift: 2-floor building, door opens 3 ticks. Lift moves 2 ticks when button pressed. Door and lift operate concurrently.

timeConstraints.description: door open lasts 3 time units
floor travel takes 2 time units

subsystems.name: Door
subsystems.description: Door opens for 3 ticks then closes. Repeats.

subsystems.name: LiftCar
subsystems.description: Moves between floors in 2 ticks when button pressed.

subsystems.name: Button
subsystems.description: Button can be pressed anytime to call the lift.
